JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850 - GRANTED FILED BY DEFENDANT DU, YI FENG HUIE, KIN TANG

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WOODS, JOYCE AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM-SHAQUILLE WOODS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DU, YI FENG HUIE, KIN TANG $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,080.00, THE COURT, ON ITS OWN MOTION, AMENDS PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO APPOINT JOYCE WOODS AS GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR SHAQUILLE WOODS, A MINOR. DAMAGES ORDERED FOR PLAINTIFF REPRESENTS DEFENDANT'S ALLOCATED PORTION OF TOTAL DAMAGES AWARD. DEFENDANT KIN TANG HUIE, DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
